docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOORE, CHANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, CHANDRA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JUN-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, NICHOLAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, CHANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLSON, NICHOLAS $618.75 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $648.75, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $4125.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 15% COMPARABLE FAUKT TO THE DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MOORE, CHANDRA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 FILED BY DEFENDANT OLSON, NICHOLAS AS TO PETITIONER MOORE, CHANDRA
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL FILED BY DEFENDANT OLSON, NICHOLAS
